context: Tests whether GameKit guidance corrects stale identity verification, saved-game, and match-data assumptions.

checklist.name: Current async identity API
checklist.description: Uses `fetchItemsForIdentityVerificationSignature()` for async identity verification and does not keep the stale `fetchItems(forIdentityVerificationSignature:)` async call shape.

checklist.name: Server signature fields
checklist.description: States that verification covers `teamPlayerID` or Apple Arcade `gamePlayerID`, bundle ID, big-endian timestamp, and salt, and rejects stale timestamps.

checklist.name: Saved-game prerequisites
checklist.description: Mentions the player's iCloud account, iCloud Drive, and app iCloud capability/container requirements for GameKit saved games.

checklist.name: Saved-game overwrite and conflicts
checklist.description: Explains that saving with an existing filename overwrites and duplicate same-name saves are conflicts to resolve, not ordinary separate save slots.

checklist.name: Async array return handling
checklist.description: Does not use nil-coalescing such as `?? []` on async GameKit APIs that return non-optional arrays, including `fetchSavedGames()`.

checklist.name: Match data size source
checklist.description: Uses the relevant GameKit object's data-size limit such as `match.matchDataMaximumSize` instead of hard-coding 64 KB.

checklist.name: No unrelated overreach
checklist.description: Keeps the output to GameKit client/server guidance and does not create an app project, backend service, or unrelated storage architecture.
